html:
Exclusive to:

The Healing Glop is an item which can only be crafted by Webber, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. When used, it will heal Webber for 8 HP, along with other spiders in an area around the player for 80 HP.

Trivia

  • The Healing Glop was added as part of Webber's Character Refresh Update.

Gallery

  • Using Healing Glop animation variant from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Using Healing Glop animation variant from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Healing Glop animation from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Healing Glop concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.

Exclusive to:
Healing Glop
"Gross, gooey, and good for you!"
Object Info
1 use
Can be Burned
20
Crafting
×2 ×2 ×2 ( only)
Filters

Always available
Miscellaneous
"spider_healer_item"
“If I see any spiders around I'll be sure to give it to them. Maybe.”
–Wilson
“Ewww it's all goopy!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will leave yucky glop for spiders.”
–Wolfgang
“Merely a temporary respite from the pain of the world.”
–Wendy
“FOR ORGANIC REPAIRS ONLY. USELESS”
–WX-78
“This balm appears specially formulated to heal arachnids.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like food for a bug.”
–Woodie
“Just in case I lose my mind entirely and want to heal those little pests.”
–Maxwell
“It is only fit for the small toothy beasts.”
–Wigfrid
“It's good for fixing spider booboos.”
–Webber
“It only appeals to a very specific palate.”
–Warly
“Gloopy”
–Wormwood
“Doesn't look like good eatin' to me.”
–Winona
“I think I'll make do without eating that goo.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, have funny smell.”
–Wurt
“It's like a first aid kit for spiders!”
–Walter
“I'm afraid that won't do me any good.”
–Wanda
The Healing Glop is an item which can only be crafted by Webber, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. When used, it will heal Webber for 8 HP, along with other spiders in an area around the player for 80 HP.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Healing Glop was added as part of Webber's Character Refresh Update.

The '''Healing Glop''' is an item which can only be crafted by [[Webber]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. When used, it will heal Webber for 8 HP, along with other spiders in an area around the player for 80 HP.
== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Healing Glop was added as part of [[Don't Starve/Version History|Webber's Character Refresh Update]].
